view.title: Validate explicit UC need #11
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for sending physical postcards as appointment reminders.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 11 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for sending physical postcards as appointment reminders.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for sending physical postcards as appointment reminders.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific requirement that a physical postcard is sent one week before an appointment for elderly patients without email. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the functionality of sending postcards, leading to an inconclusive status. The prior steps focus on other functionalities and do not address the postcard sending requirement, indicating a lack of coverage for this requirement.
